entities.name: src/main.tsx

Renders App component

entities.name: src/App.tsx

Configures TooltipProvider from shadcn/ui

Exports AppProvider component

Manages user authentication state
Manages multi-case support with cases array and currentCase
Manages document selection and view modes
Manages form fields state with updateFormField function
Manages chat messages with addChatMessage function
Manages UI state: highlightedFolder, isAdminMode, isSidebarCollapsed
Provides switchCase, addNewCase, searchCases functions
Defines AppContextType interface with 20+ properties
Imports WebSocketState, ConnectionStatus, WebSocketMessage from @/types/websocket
Manages WebSocket state: wsConnection, wsStatus, streamingMessageId, isTyping
Provides connectWebSocket function for establishing WebSocket connections
Provides disconnectWebSocket function for closing connections
Provides sendChatMessage function for sending chat messages via WebSocket
WebSocket connects to ws://localhost:8000/ws/chat/{caseId}
Handles chat_response message type for non-streaming responses
Handles chat_chunk message type for streaming responses with chunk accumulation
Handles form_update message type for form field extraction updates
Handles system and error message types
Auto-connects WebSocket when user logs in or case changes via useEffect
Cleans up WebSocket connections on component unmount
Streaming message accumulation logic appends chunks to last assistant message

entities.name: AppContext

entities.name: backend/main.py
observations: FastAPI application entry point
Configures CORS middleware for frontend communication
Registers chat_router from backend/api/chat.py
Defines lifespan context manager for startup/shutdown events
Exposes /health and / (root) endpoints
Allows origins: localhost:5173, localhost:3000
Uses uvicorn for development server on port 8000
Imports load_dotenv from dotenv module
Calls load_dotenv() at startup to load environment variables from .env file

entities.name: backend/api/chat.py
observations: WebSocket chat API for real-time AI communication
Defines ConnectionManager class for WebSocket connection lifecycle
Exports FastAPI router with /ws/chat/{case_id} WebSocket endpoint
Exports /api/chat/health GET endpoint for service health check
Handles message types: chat, system, chat_response, form_update, error
Integrates with GeminiService for AI responses
Supports form field extraction from documents
Each WebSocket connection is scoped to a specific case ID
Handles chat_chunk message type for streaming responses
Streaming responses send is_complete: false for chunks, is_complete: true for completion marker
Default streaming mode enabled for performance (stream parameter defaults to True)
handle_form_extraction() passes case_id parameter to gemini_service.generate_response()
handle_form_extraction() explicitly sets stream=False for form extraction (non-streaming mode)

entities.name: backend/api/chat.py::ConnectionManager
observations: Manages WebSocket connections for chat sessions
Maintains active_connections dict mapping case_id to WebSocket
Methods: connect(), disconnect(), send_message()
Singleton instance exported as 'manager'
Provides connection lifecycle management

entities.name: backend/api/chat.py::websocket_chat_endpoint
observations: WebSocket endpoint at /ws/chat/{case_id}
Handles real-time bidirectional AI chat
Validates incoming message format (requires 'type' field)
Routes 'chat' messages to handle_chat_message function
Sends connection confirmation on connect
Handles WebSocketDisconnect for cleanup

entities.name: backend/api/chat.py::chat_health_check
observations: GET endpoint at /api/chat/health
Returns service status and gemini_initialized state
Returns 200 if ready, 503 if not ready

entities.name: backend/services/context_manager.py
observations: Context Manager Service for case-instance document context
Defines ContextManager class for hierarchical context inheritance
Manages case-level context at cases/{caseId}/case.json
Manages folder-level context at cases/{caseId}/folders/{folderId}.json
Supports template-based case creation from templates/{caseType}/
Ensures complete isolation between cases

entities.name: backend/services/context_manager.py::ContextManager
observations: Manages case-instance scoped context for AI document processing
Initializes with base_path for context files (default: backend/data/contexts)
Methods: load_case_context(), load_folder_context(), create_case_from_template(), merge_contexts()
Loads regulations, required documents, validation rules from case.json
Merges case, folder, and document contexts into AI prompt string
Precedence: Document > Folder > Case

entities.name: backend/services/gemini_service.py
observations: Gemini AI Service for Google Gemini API integration
Defines GeminiService class with singleton pattern
Uses gemini-2.5-flash model for text generation
Integrates with ContextManager for case-specific context loading
Handles natural language chat, document analysis, translation
Supports structured data extraction for form filling
Imports time module for performance metrics
Imports AsyncGenerator and Union from typing for streaming return type

entities.name: backend/services/gemini_service.py::GeminiService
observations: Singleton service class for Gemini API interaction
Class variables: _instance, _model, _context_manager
Methods: generate_response(), _load_context(), _build_prompt(), is_initialized()
Loads API key from GEMINI_API_KEY environment variable
Uses GenerationConfig with temperature=0.7, top_p=0.8, top_k=40, max_output_tokens=2048
Automatically loads case-level and folder-level context based on case_id
generate_response method now supports streaming via stream parameter
generate_response returns Union[str, AsyncGenerator[str, None]] based on stream flag
Logs performance metrics: latency, token count, response length
Streaming mode logs time-to-first-token metric
Uses time.perf_counter() for precise timing measurements
Calls _generate_streaming_response internal method for streaming mode

entities.name: backend/tools/form_parser.py
observations: Form Parser Tool for document data extraction
Provides stateless utility functions for form field extraction
Functions: parse_document_to_form(), build_extraction_prompt(), validate_form_schema(), parse_extraction_result()
Builds structured prompts for AI-powered extraction
Parses AI JSON responses into field updates with confidence scores
Converts dates to ISO format, matches select options
build_extraction_prompt() enhanced with comprehensive multilingual instructions (German/English)
build_extraction_prompt() includes 6 detailed sections: metadata, conversion rules, instructions, examples, validation rules, error handling
build_extraction_prompt() provides date format conversion guidance (European to ISO format)
build_extraction_prompt() includes fuzzy matching instructions for select field options
parse_extraction_result() handles markdown code block cleanup from AI responses
parse_extraction_result() validates date formats using _is_valid_iso_date() helper
parse_extraction_result() converts non-ISO dates to ISO format using _convert_to_iso_date()
parse_extraction_result() implements confidence scoring based on field type and validation (range: 0.40-0.95)
parse_extraction_result() validates select field options using _match_select_option() helper
Helper functions: _is_valid_iso_date(), _convert_to_iso_date(), _match_select_option()

entities.name: src/types/websocket.ts
observations: TypeScript type definitions file for WebSocket communication
Imports FormField from @/types/case
Exports BaseMessage interface with type and optional timestamp fields
Exports ChatRequest interface extending BaseMessage for client-to-server chat messages
Exports ChatResponse interface for non-streaming AI responses
Exports ChatChunkMessage interface for streaming response chunks with is_complete flag
Exports FormUpdateMessage interface with updates and confidence records for form extraction results
Exports SystemMessage interface for connection status notifications
Exports ErrorMessage interface for error messages from server
Exports WebSocketMessage union type combining all server message types
Exports ConnectionStatus union type: disconnected | connecting | connected | error
Exports WebSocketState interface with connection, status, and error fields

entities.name: backend/services/gemini_service.py::_generate_streaming_response
observations: Private async method for streaming response generation with performance metrics
Takes parameters: full_prompt, generation_config, start_time, case_id
Returns AsyncGenerator[str, None] yielding text chunks
Records and logs time-to-first-token latency metric
Accumulates full response for final metrics logging
Logs total latency, first token latency, token count on completion
Uses stream=True parameter with model.generate_content()
Handles exceptions during streaming with error logging

entities.name: backend/api/chat.py::handle_chat_message
observations: Async function handling chat message processing
Supports both streaming and non-streaming responses via stream parameter
Takes parameters: websocket, case_id, content, message dict
Extracts documentContent, formSchema, folderId, enable_streaming from message
Detects form fill requests by checking for fill/extract/populate keywords
Calls gemini_service.generate_response with stream parameter
For streaming: sends chat_chunk messages with is_complete=False, then completion marker with is_complete=True
For non-streaming: sends single chat_response message
Handles form extraction separately via handle_form_extraction function

entities.name: backend/tools/form_parser.py::_is_valid_iso_date
observations: Validates ISO date format (YYYY-MM-DD)
Uses regex pattern matching for format validation
Uses datetime.strptime() for date validity check
Returns boolean indicating valid ISO date
Called by parse_extraction_result() for date validation

entities.name: backend/tools/form_parser.py::_convert_to_iso_date
observations: Converts various European date formats to ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD)
Supports formats: DD.MM.YYYY, DD/MM/YYYY, DD-MM-YYYY, DD.MM.YY, DD/MM/YY
Returns Optional[str] with ISO date or None on failure
Called by parse_extraction_result() for date normalization
Handles two-digit year conversion (assumes 20xx century)

entities.name: backend/tools/form_parser.py::_match_select_option
observations: Fuzzy matching for select field options against available choices
Implements three-level matching strategy: exact, partial, word-based
Case-insensitive matching for better user experience
Returns Optional[str] with matched option from available options or None
Called by parse_extraction_result() to validate and correct select field values

entities.name: backend/tools/form_parser.py::parse_extraction_result
observations: Parses AI JSON response into form field updates with confidence scores
Handles markdown code block cleanup from AI responses
Validates date formats using _is_valid_iso_date() helper
Converts non-ISO dates to ISO format using _convert_to_iso_date()
Implements confidence scoring based on field type and validation (range: 0.40-0.95)
Validates select field options using _match_select_option() helper
Returns dictionary mapping field IDs to extracted values with confidence scores
